'''Keskin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which was the site of a [[Battle of Keskin|battle]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 1|''Rebellion'' 1]] {{Ret}}
